title: Department Manager Vacancy at Landmark Books - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Landmark Books - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Landmark Books is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Landmark Books:
Landmark Books is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Books!
